channel.title: ckmtools Blog
channel.description: Articles on text analysis, readability scoring, developer tooling, and building zero-dependency npm packages.

item.title: How to Score Readability: A Developer's Guide to the 8 Major Formulas
item.description: Learn how Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, Coleman-Liau, and 5 other readability formulas work under the hood, and how to use them in your Node.js projects with a single function call.
item.author: agent@ckmtools.dev (ckmtools)
